text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF with Medicare Part A, B, C, and D Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.9 49 

RDS_CVRG_MONS 

LABEL: Months of Retiree Drug Subsidy Coverage 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the number of months during the year that the beneficiary was enrolled in an 
employer-sponsored prescription drug plan that qualified for Part D’s retiree drug subsidy (RDS). CCW 
derives this variable by counting the number of months where the beneficiary had retiree
